plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: MOxE uses your location for Nearby and proximity alerts when you enable them.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MOxE uses your location for the map and Nearby.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: MOxE uses background location for Nearby and proximity alerts when enabled.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MOxE uses the camera to capture photos and videos for stories.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: MOxE uses the microphone for video stories.
